vision: To be the most sought after Technical Campus that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To implement the Outcome Based Education (OBE) Model to conform to our belief 'Students Learn What We Teach'.
To encourage and upgrade teachers for innovative teaching skills, research and practice.
To provide necessary facility, machinery, equipment, atmosphere and ambience that would enable quality academics, research and practice.
To create an eco-system for professional competition, lifelong learning and reward mechanism.
To prepare and encourage students for societal welfare activities, higher studies, entrepreneurship, employment, research and innovations to become a complete Human Resource.

admission_process.first_year_btech: H.S.C. in PCM or equivalent with at least 45% marks & Non-Zero MHT-CET / Non-Zero Positive JEE MAIN score. OR Diploma in Engineering & Technology with at least 45% marks.
admission_process.direct_second_year: Passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology / B.Sc. Degree / D.Voc. with at least 45% marks.
admission_process.mtech: B.E. in relevant field with at least 50% marks & obtained score in GATE.
admission_process.cap_process: Centralized Admission Process (CAP) through CET Cell Maharashtra. Multiple rounds with option form submission, seat allotment, and reporting to institute.
admission_process.institute_level: Vacant seats after CAP Round IV are filled via institute-level merit list and advertisement.

placements.placement_cell: Training & Placement Cell with placement officer and departmental coordinators.
activities: Seminars, Special Lectures, Career Guidance Programmes

contact.address: Plot # 2 & 3, Sector-16, Near Thana Naka, Khandagaon, New Panvel, Navi Mumbai – 410206
